title: ICAI Convocation May 2026 Announced: An Important Update for New CAs!
content:
# ICAI Convocation May 2026 Announced: An Important Update for New CAs!

Ek important update hai! The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) ne officially Convocation May 2026 ki announcement kar di hai.

Here are the key details:

*   **Announcement Date:** The official notification was released on April 29, 2026.
*   **Convocation Date:** The event is scheduled for May 23, 2026, across various cities in India.
*   **Purpose:** This convocation is intended to award Certificates of Membership and Certificates of Practice (COP) to members jo December 2025 se April 2026 ke beech enrolled hue hain.
*   **Rank Holders:** Additionally, rank holders from the CA Final Examination jo January 2026 mein hua tha, unhe bhi felicitate kiya jaega.
*   **Intimation:** Eligible members ko ICAI se individually intimation milegi, jisme detailed venue aur timings mention honge.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.icai.org/post.html?post_id=19156)

*Published on: 1 May 2026*
